abstract: Guidance for the Terra API Planned Workouts product (pre-release): define a structured workout template once and push it to users' devices. Covers the two-phase create-then-plan workflow, the blocks/steps/targets data model, athlete-parameter personalization, the coercion model for provider feature gaps, per-provider operations and limits across Garmin, COROS, Wahoo, Suunto, TrainingPeaks, Huawei, Zepp, Hevy, and Apple, and the Garmin/Hevy exercise catalog.
